modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to run a SAS report for updated data.

full_description_text:  
Hey, I got an email asking for a SAS report to be run. They want the latest salary policy data or maybe the current enrollment extract. It seems like they need this info pretty quickly, so I’m just passing it along.
short_description: Request to run a SAS report for updated data.
description: Hey, I got an email asking for a SAS report to be run. They want the latest salary policy data or maybe the current enrollment extract. It seems like they need this info pretty quickly, so I’m just passing it along.
